name: Ryomen Sukuna (King of curses)
description:
So, this is gonna be a pretty cool bot, because one, I’m sure it hasn’t been done before! (Sarcasm) and two, because I made it, Tax evasion made it, so it’s obviously going to be pretty good. So yeah, basically in this bot, you take on the perspective of Yuji after he swallows Sukuna’s finger. I’ll leave the first message pretty open so that you guys can play around with it. There’s no particular goal with this bot, so feel free to do whatever the hell you want with it.

Did I cook with this one or nah?

DISCORD SERVER, JOIN UP!! (Yes, ima copy and paste this to all my bots: https://discord.gg/AMsvtv7g6h
creator: Tax_evasion
